title: GitHub PR status poller with spawn integration
purpose: Polls GitHub pull request status at regular intervals and updates the caller with status changes. Used to monitor PR state during development workflows.
module_context: Exports PRStatus and SpawnResult interfaces, SpawnFn type alias, defaultSpawn function, PRStatusPollerOptions and PRStatusPollerHandle interfaces, and the startPRStatusPoller factory function.

steps.content: Execute the provided command using Bun.spawn with specified working directory.
Capture stdout and stderr from the spawned process.
Wait for the process to exit and retrieve its exit code.
IF the process fails, return a default error result with code 127.
Return the process result including exit code, stdout, and stderr.
Extract worktree path, update callback, and interval from options.
Use provided spawn function or fall back to default spawn implementation.
Initialize stopped and running flags to track poller state.
Define the tick function that performs a single status check.
Execute the tick function immediately to start polling.
Schedule periodic execution of the tick function at specified interval.
Return a handle with stop method to cancel polling.
IF the poller is stopped or already running, return immediately.
Mark the poller as currently running.
Execute the GitHub CLI command to fetch PR status information.
IF the poller was stopped during execution, return early.
IF the command failed, return without updating status.
Parse the command output as JSON.
IF the parsed result contains valid PR number, notify the update callback.
Mark the poller as no longer running after completion.
